notes:
CRITICAL — all clean.
1. quests.js + regions.js: empty diff. Read-only constraint honored.
2. runtimeAudit.js: empty diff. Untouched.
3. package.json: empty diff. No new dependencies.
4. WorldMapScene scope minimal: exactly +1 import binding (_emitRegionDiscovered added to existing discoverySystem import on line 21) and +4 lines inside revealNode (comment + call). Fog/terrain/landmark/path/HMR registration all untouched. registerSceneHmr at line 1571 confirmed intact.
5. Build passes: npm run build succeeded in 12.24s with no errors. Only pre-existing chunk-size warnings (vendor-phaser, vendor-rapier, etc.) — none introduced by this work.
6. Quest themes verified: desert_healer at quests.js:176, bridge_collapse at quests.js:1113, boat_puzzle at quests.js:1429. All three questIds exist. mountain_range correctly marked pending:true — no questId referenced.

HIGH — all clean.
7. Pub/sub design: onRegionDiscovered returns an unsubscribe closure (splice by indexOf). _emitRegionDiscovered wraps each callback in try/catch and logs to console.error. Listener poisoning blocked.
8. Queue design: _pendingDiscoveryUnlocks is module-private. initDiscoveryQuestBridge pushes to queue with dedup guard (includes check). consumePendingDiscoveryUnlocks drains with splice-as-you-go; breaks after first activeQuest start (correct — one quest at a time). Items that can't start (null return from startQuest) are discarded rather than looping. No double-start or item loss on partial consumption.
9. Boot wiring: GameContainer.jsx import added at line 40 (joins systems-import group, 1 line). initDiscoveryQuestBridge() invocation at line 292, placed immediately after the DEV block (lines 285–291). NOT inside the DEV block — confirmed from diff. Orchestrator attribution correct per recovery receipt.
10. HMR registration preserved: registerSceneHmr(SCENE_KEY, import.meta.hot, WorldMapScene) at line 1571. Confirmed by grep.

MEDIUM — noted, not blocking.
11. (MEDIUM) src/renderer/game/data/discoveryUnlocks.js: Keys are locationIds (desert_foraging, copper_mine, salt_river, mountain_range), not regions.js region IDs. runtimeAudit.auditDiscoveryUnlocks() validates against regions.js and will report 4 errors on next dev boot. Worker documented this prominently in the file header with a pointer to runtimeAudit.js. Recommend follow-up cycle to update auditDiscoveryUnlocks to accept worldMapData location IDs.
12. (MEDIUM) consumePendingDiscoveryUnlocks not yet called from any scene. Queue accumulates silently. Follow-up integration task required to wire into scene checkpoints (NPC dialog, scene transition, etc.).

Note on idempotency caveat: initDiscoveryQuestBridge docstring says 'idempotent' but each call registers a distinct closure. Multiple calls would register duplicate listeners and double-queue the same questId. The dedup guard (includes check) prevents double-queueing but the duplicate listener registration is wasteful. Low risk since boot code calls it once; not a blocker but worth a comment in a follow-up.
